Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Terminating & Other Sanctions For Disobedience Of Prior Court Order Compelling Pl'S Depostion & Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Veronica Short, Esq., for defendant and moving party: ABM Industries, Defendant ABM Industries Incorporated, ABM Janitorial Services, Inc., ABM Janitorieal Services-Northern California and Lino Aguilar
Josh A. Arce, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Yuk Wa Suen

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant ABM Industries Incorporated, ABM Janitorial Services, Inc., ABM Janitorieal Services-Northern California and Lino Aguilar's motion for terminating sanctions
is denied. The motion for monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $540. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc And Motion For Sanctions For Disobedience Of Prior Court Order
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Veronika Short, Esq., for Defendant and moving party: ABM Industries Incorporated
Josh Arce, Esq., appearing by telephone, for Plaintiff and opposing party: Yuk Wa Suen

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant ABM Industries Incorporated, ABM Janitorial Services, Inc., ABM Janitorial Services-Northern California and Lino Aguilar's motion for sanctions for failure to comply with prior court order is granted in the amount of $440. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
